title: A method to fix and permeabilize isolated adult mouse cardiomyocytes for immuno-staining and confocal imaging
author: sprotocols
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: We propose a simple method to fix, attach and premeabilize isolated mouse cardiomyocytes for immuno-staining and confocal microscopic imaging. This method is highly reproducible and retains the morphology of the cardiomyocytes. This method will be useful to study morphological changes in the cytoskeletal protein architecture, organellar and protein distribution within the cell without any distortion of intracellular organization. This protocol can be completed in less than 2 days.
steps_raw: We propose a simple method to fix, attach and premeabilize isolated mouse cardiomyocytes for immuno-staining and confocal microscopic imaging. This protocol can be completed in less than 2 days.
